message:
fix: prevent integer overflow in connector numeric parameter parsing

Replace unsafe `as u32` casts with safe u32::try_from() in connector
parameter parsing to prevent silent truncation when JSON inputs
contain values exceeding u32::MAX.

Pattern applied consistently across 4 connectors:
  was: .and_then(...).unwrap_or(default) as u32
  now: .and_then(...).and_then(|v| u32::try_from(v).ok()).unwrap_or(default)

Affected:
- Gmail: max_results, offset fields
- Spotify: limit parameter across 11 search/listing operations
- Pinecone: dimension, top_k fields
- LLM-Router: priority field

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
